examples: The experiments proved that NW196 grape was easy for naturally-induced MLF.
The effects of fruit wine constituents on MLF were investigated by manual simulation.
In this paper, the time of inoculation and inoculation levels for MLF were also discussed.
In a still-unfolding investigation, Machines Francaises Lourdes (MLF) of France (formerly Forest-Line) evidently transferred highly sophisticated machine tools to the USSR.
